description: 20 条慢 SQL 评测黄金集 - 专注 MySQL 深分页场景。整个项目周期内保持不变,作为长期评测基准。任何修改需更新 CHANGELOG 并重跑历史 baseline。
scope: 针对 MySQL 深分页(LIMIT offset 较大)的慢查询优化。其他类型慢 SQL(缺索引/索引失效/OLAP等)期望 Agent 标 UNSUPPORTED,不在本评测覆盖范围。

expected_outcome_legend.rewritten_deferred_join: 应改写为延迟关联(子查询取 PK + 外层 JOIN 反查)
expected_outcome_legend.rewritten_cursor: 应改写为游标分页(WHERE pk > last_id),需业务可改 API
expected_outcome_legend.suggest_index: 应给出索引建议(改写需先加索引才有效)
expected_outcome_legend.no_optimization_needed: 应识别 offset 不大不算深分页,不必优化
expected_outcome_legend.unsupported: 应明确标 UNSUPPORTED 并给方向性建议

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, create_time FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT 1000000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: orders ~1000万行,LIMIT offset 100万,深分页核心 case

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 标准延迟关联:SELECT t.* FROM orders t JOIN (SELECT id FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT 1000000, 20) sub ON t.id=sub.id

cases.notes: 深分页最基础 case,Agent 应稳定通过

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM orders WHERE create_time > '2024-01-01' ORDER BY id LIMIT 500000, 50
input.data_volume_hint: 带 WHERE 谓词的深分页,offset 50 万

expected.notes_for_evaluator: WHERE 谓词在 idx_create_time 上,子查询应覆盖索引

cases.notes: 带过滤的深分页,生产高频

input.sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id LIMIT 200000, 100
input.data_volume_hint: SELECT * + 深分页,回表代价大

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 应延迟关联,同时可提示业务精简 SELECT 列

cases.notes: SELECT * + 深分页组合,常见反模式

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, action_type, target_id FROM user_actions ORDER BY id LIMIT 800000, 30
input.data_volume_hint: user_actions ~1500万,offset 80 万

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 大表深分页,延迟关联收益显著

cases.notes: 1500w 行级别的深分页

input.sql: SELECT * FROM reviews ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 300000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: reviews 含 content TEXT 字段,SELECT * + 深分页双重代价

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 延迟关联 + 强烈建议避开 TEXT 字段

cases.notes: TEXT 字段下深分页

input.sql: SELECT id, name, price FROM products WHERE category_id = 99 ORDER BY id LIMIT 100000, 50
input.data_volume_hint: WHERE category + ORDER BY id 深分页

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 延迟关联,子查询走 idx_category 后排序

cases.notes: WHERE 列和 ORDER BY 列不同

input.sql: SELECT o.id, o.amount, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.create_time > '2024-01-01' ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 2 表 JOIN + 深分页,业界高频

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 先在 orders 上深分页拿 20 个 id,再 JOIN users。两步法是关键

cases.notes: JOIN 深分页,LLM 改写质量分水岭

input.sql: SELECT o.id, o.amount, oi.product_id, oi.quantity FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 1 ORDER BY o.id LIMIT 200000, 30
input.data_volume_hint: orders 1对N order_items,JOIN 后行数膨胀

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 1 对 N 关系下,延迟关联要在 orders 上分页(取 30 个 order),再 JOIN items 拿明细。注意此时返回行数 > 30(每订单多 items)

cases.notes: 1对N JOIN + 深分页,LLM 容易在哪个表分页搞错

input.sql: SELECT o.id, o.amount, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY u.register_time LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 排序键在 JOIN 表上,延迟关联效果差

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 排序在 users.register_time 而非主表 orders,延迟关联无法绕过 100000 次回表。可接受:1)标 unsupported 建议改业务 2)建议在 users.register_time + JOIN 关系上加复合索引

cases.notes: 排序在非主表,深分页改写的边界 case

input.sql: SELECT r.id, r.rating, p.name FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE p.category_id = 99 ORDER BY r.id LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: JOIN + WHERE 在右表 + 深分页

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 需要 LLM 想清楚:子查询要保留 JOIN 条件 + WHERE 谓词。延迟关联 SQL 较复杂

cases.notes: JOIN 条件依赖右表过滤的深分页

input.sql: SELECT o.id, u.name, p.name AS product_name, oi.quantity FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.create_time > '2024-01-01' ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 4 表 JOIN + 深分页,典型订单详情列表深翻页

expected.notes_for_evaluator: ★ 亮点 case。正确改写: 子查询先在 orders 上做深分页拿 20 个 id,再 JOIN 其他三张表

cases.notes: 4 表 JOIN + 深分页,典型复杂多表深分页场景

input.sql: SELECT o.id, u.name, p.name, m.name AS merchant_name, c.name AS category_name, oi.quantity FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN merchants m ON p.merchant_id = m.id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE o.create_time > '2024-01-01' ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 50000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 5 表 JOIN + 深分页,完整电商订单视图

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 同 case_dp_c_001,但 JOIN 链更长。改写后子查询只跑一次 5万 offset,外层 JOIN 5 表只针对 20 行

cases.notes: 复杂场景上限

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM orders WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: ORDER BY create_time 非 PK,同时间订单可能重复,LIMIT OFFSET 不稳定

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 延迟关联 + 在 ORDER BY 末尾加 id 作 tie-breaker(ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC)。assumptions 必须显式声明引入了排序细化

cases.notes: ORDER BY 非 PK,需 tie-breaker。verify 可能 UNDETERMINED(原 SQL 本身不稳定)

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM orders ORDER BY status DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 多列 ORDER BY,但 (status, create_time) 仍可能有重复,LIMIT OFFSET 不稳定

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 延迟关联 + 追加 id DESC 作最终 tie-breaker(ORDER BY status DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC)

cases.notes: 多列 ORDER BY 仍不唯一,tie-breaker 适用

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, create_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = 100 ORDER BY id LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 业务允许改 API,可推荐游标分页

expected.notes_for_evaluator: ★ 业务能改 API + 无限滚动 UI,游标分页性能最优(WHERE id > :last_id ORDER BY id LIMIT 20)。assumptions 声明改写改了 API 语义

cases.notes: 业务能改 API,推荐游标

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 200000, 30
input.data_volume_hint: 业务能改 API + 数据要求实时,游标最优

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 游标分页,不引入缓存方案(实时性要求)

cases.notes: 业务约束驱动选游标

input.sql: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT 500000, 50
input.data_volume_hint: 业务不能改 API,只能延迟关联

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 明确不能改 API → 排除游标分页,选延迟关联

cases.notes: 业务约束决定选延迟关联

input.sql: SELECT id, amount, create_time FROM orders WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id LIMIT 300000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: 老业务跳页 UI,深翻页用户体验也差

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 延迟关联 + additional_suggestions 提示业务:'深翻页 > 100 页用户体验差,建议产品层加最大页码限制'

cases.notes: 跳页 UI,延迟关联 + 业务方向建议

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT 100, 20
input.data_volume_hint: offset=100,不算深分页

expected.notes_for_evaluator: ★ 反向 case:offset=100 不属于深分页(扫描代价小),Agent 应识别不必优化。测克制力

cases.notes: offset 不大不算深分页,测 Agent 不滥优化

input.sql: SELECT id, user_id, rating FROM reviews WHERE product_id = 100 ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 100000, 20
input.data_volume_hint: rating 列无索引,即使做延迟关联子查询也无法走索引

expected.notes_for_evaluator: 改写延迟关联依赖子查询走索引,但 ORDER BY rating 无索引。同时建议加 idx_product_rating(product_id, rating) 才能让改写真正生效

cases.notes: 改写 + 索引建议组合,生产真实场景
